_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish continuous monitoring scoring and grading metrics
reference_document_element_description: Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degradation thresholds, drift detection, and incident response procedures.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI AI domain. Task AI-T-004 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: AI-T-017 (AI, cosine: 0.478), DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.474).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.5/10 (raw 0.450). Shared vocabulary: [monitoring]. NICE-only terms [continuous, establish, grading, metrics, scoring] vs WIDAI-only terms [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.883 (P=0.890, R=0.876). Balanced P/R — the 7-word NICE element and 16-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.1%). "Establish continuous monitoring scoring and grading metrics" and "Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degrad" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.513 > STS 0.450 (gap +0.064). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [monitoring] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 10.0%. Shared tokens: [monitoring]. NICE-only: [continuous, establish, grading, metrics, scoring]. WIDAI-only: [alerting, dashboards, degradation, detection, drift, implement].
